description: Send emails via SMTP and post messages to Slack. Credentials are provided via environment variables; SMTP hosts can be allowlisted.

tools.name: send_email
tools.description: Send an email via SMTP using configured credentials.

parameters.name: smtp_host
parameters.description: SMTP server host. Defaults to SMTP_HOST env var.

parameters.name: smtp_port
parameters.description: SMTP server port. Defaults to SMTP_PORT env var.

tools.whenToUse: Use when the user explicitly asks to send an email notification or summary.
tools.whenNotToUse: Do not use for spam, unsolicited messages, or when SMTP credentials are not configured.

tools.name: send_slack_message
tools.description: Send a message to a Slack channel.
tools.returns: Confirmation with message timestamp or error.
tools.whenToUse: Use when the user explicitly asks to notify a Slack channel.
tools.whenNotToUse: Do not use without a configured SLACK_TOKEN or for channels the token cannot access.

tools.name: list_slack_channels
tools.description: List public Slack channels accessible to the bot.
tools.returns: List of channel names and IDs.
tools.whenToUse: Use when you need to find the correct channel ID/name before sending a message.
tools.whenNotToUse: Do not use when the channel is already known.
